name: Panim Afterlife Registry
summary: Registry overseeing offerings, coffin quality, and the administrative side of Panim’s afterlife economy.
day_to_day: Records funerary contracts, categorizes offerings, and manages status-linked burial preparation.
who_works_there: Registry clerks, ritual advisors, coffin assessors, shrine staff.
who_uses_it: Families of the dead, nobles, merchants, pilgrims, mediators.
authority: Can certify afterlife preparations and shape access to Panim-sanctioned rites.
public_manifestation: Coffin ledgers, offering counters, ritual appointments, ranked funerary goods.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Grief, status, and money create a constant risk of exploitation or scandal.
